column1: # Save+reload preserves the 1-2-3 source form on the panel.
# Without the reverse translator, a reloaded `@AVG(A1..A5)` would
# show as `AVERAGE(A1:A5)` because IronCalc only knows the Excel
# form. The reverse pass in `cell_view_to_contents` swaps it back
# (renames, niladic parens, range separator, INDIRECT, sheet refs)
# so the panel stays authentic across save → retrieve.
# A9: @SUM(A1..A5) — passthrough name, range separator must reverse.
# /File Retrieve the same file. The engine hands back the Excel
# Each formula's panel readout should match what the user typed.
